transcription.text: lego mario time here we go and the adventure continues collect coins along the way and get to the goal on time now design a new level add the maker set with new action bricks select different reactions when lego mario steps on them hurry through the course watch out for the poison mushroom oh no new enemies lego super mario your levels your adventures lego mario included in starter course other sets sold separately batteries not included
